channel.title: Sketch on allokkio
channel.description: Recent content in Sketch on allokkio

item.title: Sketch: Growing Line
item.description: adapted from here // actual script --------------------------------------------------------------- var gl; var tStep = 0.3; var c_size = 450 var midpoint = c_size/2 function setup() { var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size); canvas.parent('sketch-holder'); // Line /*gl = new GrowingLine(false); gl.addPoint(10,0.5*height,true,20); for(var x=20; x1){ if(this.closed){ this.springs.pop(); } this.springs.push(new Spring(this.points[this.points.length-2],this.points[this.points.length-1],len)); if(this.closed){ this.springs.push(new Spring(this.points[this.points.length-1],this.points[0],len)); } } }, insertPoint: function(fixed=false, len0, len1, firstIndex){ if(this.points.length 1){ let midPos = p5.Vector.add(this.points[firstIndex].pos,this.points[firstIndex+1].pos).mult(0.5); this.points.splice(firstIndex+1,0,new Point(midPos.x, midPos.y, fixed)); this.

item.title: Sketch: Doodle Flower
item.description: Code: var c_size = 450 var midpoint = 0.5*c_size; var c_pad = c_size - 20 var alpha_decay = 20 var easing = 0.03; var x = midpoint var y = midpoint var red = 30 var green = 144 var blue = 255 var update_time = 0 var update_step = 100 function setup() { background("#DDDCD3"); var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size); canvas.parent('sketch-holder'); } function mousePressed() { red = 30 green = 144 blue = 255 } function draw() { if (frameCount > update_time) { update_time += update_step red = round( random(1,244) ) green = round( random(1,244) ) blue = round( random(1,244) ) } //square stroke("#DDDCD3") fill("#DDDCD3") rect(0,0,c_size-1,c_size-1); // outer circles fill("#EEEDE4"); stroke("#EEEDE4") ellipse(0,0,c_size,c_size); ellipse(0,c_size,c_size,c_size); ellipse(c_size,0,c_size,c_size); ellipse(c_size,c_size,c_size,c_size); // line stroke(red, green, blue); line(midpoint, midpoint, x, y) // cicrles 1 fill(red, green, blue); stroke(red, green, blue); ellipse(midpoint, midpoint, c_pad/6, c_pad/6); ellipse(x, y, 25, 25); ellipse(0.

item.title: Sketch: A little Animation-Test
Sketch: Flares
item.description: Code: var canvas_size = 450; var canvas_pad = 50; var radius = (canvas_size-canvas_pad)/2; var midpoint = canvas_size/2; var ball_radius = 150; // Blob def function Blob(x,y) { this.pos = createVector(x,y) this.vel = p5.Vector.random2D(); this.vel.mult(10,20) this.r = ball_radius // this.update= function() { this.pos.add(this.vel) var pos_out = (midpoint-this.pos.x)**2 + (midpoint-this.pos.y)**2 >= (radius-0.3*ball_radius)**2 if (pos_out) { this.vel.x *= -1 this.vel.y *= -1 } } } // script for running metaballs var b=[] function setup() { //b = new Blob(100,100) var canvas = createCanvas(canvas_size, canvas_size); canvas.

item.title: Sketch: Gaussian Star
item.description: Another little Javascript-animation based on Gaussian ellipses. Code: var c_size = 450 var half_c_size = 0.5*c_size; var c_pad = c_size - 20 var time = 0.0 var increment = 0.002; var time_to_update = time + 2*increment; var increment_to_update = 0.03; var n = 0 var m = 0 function setup() { background("#DDDCD3"); var canvas = createCanvas(c_size, c_size); canvas.parent('sketch-holder'); // info: textSize(19); stroke(221,220,211); fill(221,220,211); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/4, c_pad/4); // fill("#EEEDE4"); text(" ~68% \n of the radii", c_pad/2-40, c_size/2); // decoration: // outer circles fill(221,220,211,0); stroke(221,220,211); strokeWeight(3); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/3, c_pad/3); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/2, c_pad/2); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad, c_pad); // outer ellipses strokeWeight(1); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/3, c_pad/4); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/4, c_pad/3); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/2, c_pad/3); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/3, c_pad/2); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad , c_pad/2); ellipse(half_c_size, half_c_size, c_pad/2, c_pad ); } function draw() { translate(width/2, height/2); rotate(frameCount / 50.
